data.content:
Regional Supply Chain VP
The Regional Supply Chain VP negotiates the APAC quota with HQ in Geneva for the following year.

Aurelle Master Inventory System
The Aurelle Master Inventory System tracks unique piece numbers for high jewellery, ensuring no duplication or substitution.

Singapore Distribution Centre (SDC)
The Singapore Distribution Centre is the primary hub for Southeast Asia, with a warehousing capacity of 12,000 units and an average transit time of 3–5 business days.

Allocation Optimizer
The Allocation Optimizer engine applies weighted criteria to manage limited stock of high-demand references across boutiques.

Aurelle APAC
Aurelle APAC operates a dual-hub supply chain model across 13 markets and 67 boutique/sales points, focusing on speed-to-market and inventory health.<SEP>Aurelle APAC is a company that provides after-sales service and repair operations, focusing on client retention and brand equity.<SEP>Aurelle APAC is the organization responsible for the Learning & Development Framework, specifically the Client Advisor Excellence Program (CAEP).<SEP>Aurelle APAC is an organization responsible for budget planning, revenue reporting, and financial governance across its markets in the Asia-Pacific region.<SEP>Aurelle APAC is a company that operates a unified CRM and digital engagement stack, focusing on global brand consistency and regional digital infrastructure.

India Supply Corridor
The India Supply Corridor supplies India from the Singapore Distribution Centre, with customs clearance handled in Mumbai.

Emergency Stock Request (ESR)
The Emergency Stock Request is a protocol for boutique directors to request urgent stock from Switzerland when specific conditions are met.

Switzerland Direct (ZHD)
Switzerland Direct supplies North Asia directly from Manufacture in Le Brassus/Geneva, utilizing Swiss Air Freight for lower transit times.

CRM
The CRM system tracks client commitments and Emergency Stock Requests, ensuring timely communication and escalation of delays.<SEP>CRM refers to the Customer Relationship Management system used to document resolutions for Level 2 complaints.<SEP>CRM (Customer Relationship Management) is a system used to log and manage client interactions and service requests.

High Jewellery
High Jewellery refers to exclusive pieces allocated on a piece-by-piece basis, each tracked in the Aurelle master inventory system.<SEP>High Jewellery refers to unique or limited pieces in precious stones offered by Aurelle, representing the pinnacle of luxury.<SEP>High Jewellery refers to luxury items that perform above the average in the Asia-Pacific region within the Macau market.<SEP>High Jewellery refers to a category of luxury jewellery that contributes significantly to Aurelle's revenue.<SEP>High Jewellery refers to luxury jewelry items that may be subject to complaints in the escalation protocol.<SEP>High Jewellery refers to a category of luxury items with a gross margin of 74–78%.<SEP>High Jewellery refers to the luxury segment of jewellery collections that represents the highest expression of craftsmanship and client relationship investment.

Classic Jewellery
Classic Jewellery includes items like LOVE, Trinity, and Juste un Clou, which are replenishment-driven with a dedicated safety stock.<SEP>Classic Jewellery includes items like LOVE and Trinity perennials, with a gross margin of 71–74%.

Fragrances & Accessories
Fragrances and Accessories are managed separately from the jewellery and watches allocation policy through a commercial distribution network.<SEP>Fragrances & Accessories are a product category with a gross margin of 58–63%.

Watches
Watches are a product category managed under the supply chain, including perennial references and limited editions with specific allocation strategies.<SEP>Watches represent the dominant category in Australian revenue, accounting for 54% of total sales.<SEP>Watches are timekeeping devices that are part of a broader offering including jewellery, accessories, and fragrance.<SEP>Watches are categorized into perennial references and complications, with varying gross margins.

Seoul Workshop
The Seoul Workshop is located in South Korea and has recently been upgraded, employing 18 watchmakers and 6 jewellery craftspeople.

Aurelle
Aurelle is a luxury brand renowned for its specialization in high-end jewelry and watchmaking, with a significant presence in the Southeast Asia, India, and Greater China markets. The brand is celebrated for its diverse collections, which feature both conceptual designs and iconic lines such as the Juste un Clou and Panthère collections. Aurelle places a strong emphasis on after-sales service and client care, viewing these elements as essential tools for enhancing consumer engagement and fostering lasting relationships.

In addition to its jewelry offerings, Aurelle is recognized for its luxury watches, which combine elegance with high-value timepieces. The brand's heritage and relevance in the Asia-Pacific (APAC) region are pivotal, as it strives to maintain a robust market presence and achieve ambitious revenue targets. Aurelle's strategic initiatives include a focus on client segmentation and relationship management, which are critical for driving significant revenue growth through retail and digitalization efforts.

Aurelle also organizes events aimed at enhancing client relationships and experiences within the APAC region. The brand operates boutiques that prioritize providing a unique client experience and high-quality service, further solidifying its commitment to luxury and customer satisfaction. Additionally, Aurelle is involved in retail pricing and financial policy in the APAC region, aligning its pricing strategies with a European headquarters model. Overall, Aurelle embodies a dedication to craftsmanship, quality, and the investment in client relationships across its various product lines.<SEP>Aurelle is the organization that developed the internal LLM used in the Gen AI Drafting Tool.<SEP>Aurelle is a company focused on human capital and talent strategy in the APAC region, emphasizing client relationships and employee roles.

Tokyo Service Centre
The Tokyo Service Centre is dedicated to the Japan market and has the highest capacity per market, with 28 watchmakers and 8 jewellery craftspeople.

data.entity_name: After-Sales Service & Client Care Protocol APAC
data.content:
After-Sales Service & Client Care Protocol APAC
The After-Sales Service & Client Care Protocol APAC outlines the standards and practices for client service in the Asia-Pacific region.

Singapore Service Centre
The Singapore Service Centre is the primary regional service hub for Southeast Asia, India, and Australia, with a capacity for 45 watchmakers and 12 jewellery craftspeople.

Hong Kong Workshop
The Hong Kong Workshop serves HK and Macau and handles high-complexity HJ restoration.

Shanghai Service Centre
The Shanghai Service Centre serves Mainland China and Taiwan, with specific regulatory requirements for repairs on China-duty-paid items.

Certificate of Service
The Certificate of Service is issued for all watch services, documenting movement condition, parts replaced, and test results, enhancing the piece's provenance and value.

Warranty
The Warranty includes an international warranty of 2 years on all watches and an optional extended service plan called Aurelle Prestige Care.

Aurelle Prestige Care
Aurelle Prestige Care is an optional extended service plan offered by Aurelle, providing a 5-year extension and additional benefits for clients.

Bangkok
Bangkok is the key city in Thailand for luxury retail, housing two major boutiques.

BGC High Street
BGC High Street is another luxury boutique in Manila, serving the high-end consumer base.

ICONSIAM Maison
ICONSIAM Maison is a flagship boutique in Bangkok, contributing significantly to the luxury market.

Greenbelt 5 Makati
Greenbelt 5 Makati is a luxury boutique in Manila, contributing to the luxury market.

Changi Hub
Changi Hub is a significant transit point in Singapore, attracting luxury tourists who engage in boutique visits.

Manila
Manila is the capital city of the Philippines, hosting several luxury boutiques.

Siam Paragon
Siam Paragon is a boutique in Bangkok that plays a role in the Thai luxury market.

Mumbai DLF Emporio
Mumbai DLF Emporio is a flagship boutique in India, significantly impacting the luxury market.

Bangalore
Bangalore is a city in India where new boutiques are planned to open, targeting the luxury market.

Hyderabad
Hyderabad is another city in India where luxury boutiques are set to open.

Australian Market
The Australian market presents unique challenges for luxury brands, including high churn rates and price sensitivity.

Delhi Select Citywalk
Delhi Select Citywalk is a luxury boutique in India, contributing to the overall revenue target.

Brisbane
Brisbane is a location valued at USD 3 million in the Aurelle APAC portfolio.

Melbourne Collins Street
Melbourne Collins Street is a location valued at USD 6 million within the Aurelle APAC portfolio.

Pitt Street Maison
Pitt Street Maison is a flagship location with a valuation of USD 9 million, part of the Aurelle APAC portfolio.

Perth
Perth is a location valued at USD 2 million in the Aurelle APAC portfolio.

Aurelle APAC Portfolio
The Aurelle APAC portfolio includes various luxury market locations and strategies within the Asia-Pacific region.

CRM Investment
CRM investment refers to the financial commitment to enhance customer relationship management efforts in Australia for FY2025.

Australia
Australia is a country facing unique market challenges and opportunities within the Aurelle APAC portfolio.<SEP>Australia is a market that demonstrates steady-state premium market management with a focus on client retention.<SEP>Australia has the highest churn rate at 24%, characterized by a transactional market and lower emotional brand attachment.<SEP>Australia is projected to contribute USD 42M to Aurelle's revenue in FY2025.<SEP>Australia is a market with retail prices indexed at 108–112, which includes a GST of 10%.<SEP>Australia is a country noted for having a high client-facing turnover rate of 28% in the context of the text.

Santos
Santos is a leading watch brand in Australia, contributing significantly to the luxury watch market.<SEP>Santos is a watch model that is part of Aurelle's offerings and is targeted towards Tier 1 collectors.<SEP>Santos is an iconic code that represents a recognizable theme or design in the product offering.

VIC Program
The VIC program is a dedicated initiative targeting 400 Tier 1 clients in Australia with private experiences.

Ballon Bleu
Ballon Bleu is another leading watch brand in Australia, recognized for its luxury offerings.<SEP>Ballon Bleu is a watch model that has a strong female client base and is known for high cross-sell to jewellery.

Bridal Opportunity
Bridal opportunity refers to the potential for growth in the Australian engagement ring market, which is currently underexploited.

Tiffany
Tiffany is the dominant brand in the Australian engagement ring market.

24% Churn Rate
The 24% churn rate indicates the highest rate of customer turnover in the Australian market among APAC markets.

Aurelle's Solitaire Collection
Aurelle's solitaire collection is a product line with potential for growth in the Australian market with proper brand investment.

Price Sensitivity
Price sensitivity describes the degree to which consumers in Australia are affected by price changes relative to their income level.

Emotional Luxury Attachment
Emotional luxury attachment refers to the level of emotional connection consumers have with luxury brands, which is noted as low in Australia.

India
Mumbai DLF Emporio serves as a flagship boutique in the Indian luxury market.<SEP>India is an emerging market for bridal jewelry, requiring education on G<SEP>India is classified as an 'Investment Market' for 2025, focusing on long-term market development with limited boutique networks in Delhi and Mumbai.<SEP>India is classified as an 'Investment Market' for Aurelle, with limited boutique presence and long-term development goals.<SEP>India is expected to generate USD 42M in revenue for Aurelle in FY2025.<SEP>India is a market with retail prices indexed at 120–130, noted for the highest duty burden in APAC.

Singapore
Aurelle operates in Singapore, which serves as its APAC regional headquarters.<SEP>Singapore is a location with an internationally educated creative class, important for Aurelle's market presence.<SEP>Singapore is identified as the regional events hub for High Jewellery in the APAC region, specifically anchored at ION Orchard Maison Mansion.<SEP>Singapore is a market with retail prices indexed at 104–107, characterized by a GST of 9%.<SEP>Singapore is a city where the ION Orchard Maison Salon is located for high jewellery events.

Philippines
Manila is a significant location for luxury boutiques in the Philippines.<SEP>The Philippines is a market with retail prices indexed at 115–120, facing high tariff rates on luxury items.<SEP>The Philippines is mentioned as having a client-facing turnover rate of 22%, contributing to overall turnover concerns.

Thailand
Bangkok is identified as the key city in Thailand for the luxury market.<SEP>Thailand is a market with retail prices indexed at 112–118, known for high import duties on luxury goods.

Panthère de Aurelle Ring
The Panthère de Aurelle Ring features onyx and emerald, priced around USD 5,200.

Juste un Clou Bracelet
The Juste un Clou Bracelet is a jewelry piece designed by Aldo Cipullo, made from a bent nail in gold or platinum, recognized as a landmark of 20th-century design.

Jeanne Toussaint
Jeanne Toussaint is Aurelle's legendary creative director, known for her influence on the brand's panther motif.

Juste un Clou Ring
The Juste un Clou Ring is a jewelry piece featuring a nail motif, available with diamonds and priced around USD 4,800.

Aldo Cipullo
Aldo Cipullo is a renowned jewellery designer credited with creating several iconic collections for Aurelle.<SEP>Aldo Cipullo is a designer known for creating the Juste un Clou bracelet, which is a significant piece in conceptual art and jewelry design.

Panthère Motif Jewellery
Panthère Motif Jewellery includes various pieces featuring three-dimensional panther figures, made from white gold, yellow gold, and platinum, adorned with diamonds and onyx.

Juste un Clou Earrings
The Juste un Clou Earrings are jewelry items designed with a nail motif, priced around USD 3,200.

Panthère Pendant
The Panthère Pendant is a small jewelry piece made with white gold and diamonds, priced around USD 8,400.

Panthère Bracelet
The Panthère Bracelet is a high-value jewelry item featuring full pavé, priced around USD 44,000.

Bridal Offering
Aurelle's bridal offering includes classic solitaires and signature collections, with notable references like the Destinée and 1895 collections.

1895 Collection
The 1895 Collection includes solitaires ranging from USD 8,500 to over USD 85,000, depending on the carat weight.

Destinée Collection
The Destinée Collection features innovative prong settings that make diamonds appear suspended, starting from USD 7,200.

Coloratura
Coloratura is a seasonal collection featuring vibrant sapphires, emeralds, and rubies in geometric settings.

Étourdissant de Aurelle
Étourdissant de Aurelle is a seasonal collection characterized by celestial motifs.

Fine Jewellery Collections
Fine Jewellery Collections are seasonal offerings from Aurelle featuring fashion-forward designs and colored stones.

Tokyo
Tokyo is a city noted for its strong design culture and is a significant market for Aurelle's jewelry.<SEP>Tokyo is a city that hosts a Ginza Mansion Private Floor for high jewellery events.

Seoul
Seoul is a city recognized for its fashion-forward young luxury market, contributing to Aurelle's commercial success.<SEP>Seoul is a city with a Maison Salon located in Cheongdam for private viewing events.

Japan
Japan is a key market for Aurelle, particularly noted for high engagement ring spending.<SEP>Japan is a significant market for Aurelle, known for its high product knowledge and brand sensitivity among consumers.<SEP>Japan has the lowest churn rate at 8% annually, attributed to a relationship culture and long stylist tenure.<SEP>Japan is a country in Northeast Asia known for its mature luxury market and high client loyalty metrics.<SEP>Japan is expected to contribute USD 85M to Aurelle's revenue in FY2025.<SEP>Japan is a market with retail prices indexed at 108–115, affected by a consumption tax.<SEP>Japan is a region where Aurelle APAC utilizes LINE as the primary CRM communication channel.

Hong Kong
Hong Kong is a significant market for Aurelle's Panthère Motif Jewellery, appealing to Tier 1–2 clients.<SEP>Hong Kong serves as a sophisticated cross-border hub for luxury shopping and is a benchmark for retail excellence for Aurelle.<SEP>Hong Kong is a market with retail prices indexed at 103–106, characterized by a low duty environment.<SEP>Hong Kong is a city with a Landmark Maison for hosting high jewellery events.

APAC Commercial Role
APAC Commercial Role refers to the market strategy and client engagement approach of Aurelle in the Asia-Pacific region, focusing on high-margin transactions with fashion-forward clients.

Taiwan
Taiwan is recognized as a strong market for Aurelle's bridal offerings.<SEP>Taiwan is a market with loyal clients and a high-visibility flagship boutique located at Taipei 101.<SEP>Taiwan is a location known for its strong community of independent watch collectors and luxury market dynamics.<SEP>Taiwan is a small but sophisticated market in Northeast Asia with a high per-capita luxury spend among wealthy individuals.<SEP>Taiwan is projected to contribute USD 28M to Aurelle's revenue in FY2025.<SEP>Taiwan is a market with retail prices indexed at 109–114, influenced by import duties.

Market Notes
Market Notes provide insights into the performance and preferences of Aurelle's jewelry offerings in various geographical markets.

Aurelle Product Universe
Aurelle Product Universe is a jewellery portfolio that serves as a sales and product knowledge reference for the APAC region.<SEP>The Aurelle Product Universe encompasses the fragrance and accessories portfolio targeted at the APAC market.

Trinity Collection
The Trinity Collection consists of three interlocking bands of gold, representing fidelity, friendship, and love, and is popular among clients.

LOVE Collection
The LOVE Collection is an iconic jewellery line created by Aldo Cipullo, featuring a bracelet that symbolizes commitment and love.

Sophia Loren
Sophia Loren is a celebrated actress who has worn the LOVE bracelet, enhancing its prestige.

APAC
APAC refers to the Asia-Pacific region, where Aurelle's jewellery portfolio generates significant revenue.<SEP>APAC refers to the Asia-Pacific region, which is a critical market for Aurelle, contributing significantly to its global revenue.<SEP>APAC refers to the Asia-Pacific region where Aurelle's watches generate significant revenue and market engagement.<SEP>APAC refers to the Asia-Pacific region where Aurelle's commercial strategies are focused.<SEP>APAC refers to the Asia-Pacific region, which is a significant market for Aurelle's fragrance and accessories portfolio.<SEP>APAC refers to the Asia-Pacific region where SAV services contribute to boutique revenue.<SEP>APAC refers to the Asia-Pacific region where Aurelle operates and manages its workforce and talent strategy.

Elizabeth Taylor
Elizabeth Taylor is a famous actress known for wearing the LOVE bracelet, contributing to its cultural significance.

Juste un Clou
Juste un Clou is a conceptual jewellery design by Aldo Cipullo, shaped like a bent nail, symbolizing the triumph of art over conventional design.

Chinese Valentine's Day
Chinese Valentine's Day, celebrated on May 20th, is culturally linked to gifting the LOVE bracelet in China.

Qixi Festival
Qixi Festival, also known as the Double Seventh Festival, is another occasion associated with gifting the LOVE bracelet in China.

Écrou de Aurelle
Écrou de Aurelle is a fine jewellery collection that is part of Aurelle's offerings, showcasing the brand's craftsmanship.

Diamants Légers
Diamants Légers is a fine jewellery collection within Aurelle's portfolio, contributing to the brand's offerings in the APAC region.

Bridal & Solitaires
Bridal & Solitaires is a category within Aurelle's jewellery portfolio, focusing on wedding and engagement pieces.

Delhi
Delhi is a city in India where a boutique network for High Jewellery is located, specifically at DLF Emporio.

VIC Concentration Strategy
The VIC Concentration Strategy involves shifting 15% of the total marketing budget towards hyper-personalized experiences.

Mumbai
Mumbai is a city in India where a boutique network for High Jewellery is located, specifically at Bandra Kurla Complex.

Aurelle Complications
Aurelle Complications is positioned as both cultural and financial assets within the investment watch sentiment in Japan and Korea.

Responsible Sourcing Charter
Aurelle's Responsible Sourcing Charter focuses on ethically sourced diamonds and recycled precious metals, integrated into client conversations.

APAC Brand Expression Guidelines v3.2
The APAC Brand Expression Guidelines v3.2 outline the parameters for local adaptations in regional campaigns.

Collins Street
Collins Street is a location in Melbourne where a boutique serves affluent Chinese-Australian clientele.

Westfield Sydney
Westfield Sydney is a location in Sydney where a boutique serves affluent Chinese-Australian clientele.

Bandra Kurla Complex
Bandra Kurla Complex is a location in Mumbai where a boutique network for High Jewellery is situated.

data.entity_name: Aurelle APAC Brand Strategy & Competitive Positioning 2025
data.content:
Aurelle APAC Brand Strategy & Competitive Positioning 2025
Aurelle APAC Brand Strategy & Competitive Positioning 2025 outlines the brand's strategic vision and competitive positioning in the APAC region for the year 2025.

Timeless Modernity
Timeless Modernity is the global mandate under which Aurelle's APAC brand strategy operates, focusing on preserving heritage while appealing to modern consumers.

Savoir-Faire Authenticity
Savoir-Faire Authenticity is one of the core pillars of Aurelle's brand positioning, emphasizing the brand's heritage and craftsmanship.

Aspirational Accessibility
Aspirational Accessibility is a core pillar of Aurelle's brand strategy that aims to attract consumers through entry-level product categories.

Radical Exclusivity at the Top
Radical Exclusivity at the Top is a brand positioning strategy that focuses on maintaining scarcity and high value in Aurelle's top-tier products.

Tier 1 Rivals
Tier 1 Rivals are the primary competitors of Aurelle in the APAC market, including brands like Van Cleef & Arpels and Bvlgari.

Chinese Domestic Luxury Brands
Chinese Domestic Luxury Brands refer to emerging competitors in the luxury market, particularly in Tier 2 Chinese cities.

Tier 2 Rivals
Tier 2 Rivals are competitors in the watches and accessories segment, including brands like Rolex and Patek Philippe.

Trinity-to-Haute-Joaillerie Continuum
The Trinity-to-Haute-Joaillerie Continuum is a differentiation advantage for Aurelle, offering a wide range of products from entry-level to bespoke creations.

Greater China
Greater China encompasses Mainland China, Hong Kong, and Macau, which are key markets for Aurelle's brand strategy.<SEP>Greater China includes Mainland China, Hong Kong, and Macau, and is projected to generate USD 310M in revenue for Aurelle in FY2025.

South Korea
South Korea is an important market for Aurelle, characterized by younger affluent demographics and influencer-driven luxury discovery.<SEP>South Korea has an 11% churn rate, with strong brand loyalty influenced by cultural brand prestige.<SEP>South Korea is a rapidly growing market in Northeast Asia, influenced by cultural phenomena like K-drama and K-pop.<SEP>South Korea is projected to generate USD 62M in revenue for Aurelle in FY2025.<SEP>South Korea is a market with retail prices indexed at 110–116, which includes a luxury goods tax.<SEP>South Korea is a region where Aurelle APAC employs KakaoTalk as the primary communication tool.

VIC Cultivation
VIC Cultivation refers to the strategy of developing Very Important Clients in the Greater China market, emphasizing volume leadership.

LOVE Bracelet
The LOVE Bracelet is a product segment of Aurelle that is at risk from grey market price arbitrage.<SEP>The LOVE bracelet is a jewelry piece that has a strong cross-sell relationship with the Ballon Bleu watches.<SEP>The LOVE Bracelet is a luxury item that is less preferred compared to the Trinity Ring in the APAC market.<SEP>The LOVE Bracelet is a luxury item that is less preferred compared to the Trinity Ring in Taiwan.

Southeast Asia
Southeast Asia includes countries like Singapore, Thailand, and the Philippines, where Aurelle aims to deepen its VIC network.<SEP>The Southeast Asia cluster, including Singapore, Thailand, Philippines, and Malaysia, is expected to contribute USD 93M in revenue for Aurelle in FY2025.<SEP>Southeast Asia is a region where email remains dominant for formal CRM communications.

Santos de Aurelle
Santos de Aurelle is an entry-level watch category that serves as part of Aurelle's client acquisition strategy.<SEP>Santos de Aurelle is a watch collection designed for male clients, known for its heritage and distinctive design features.<SEP>Santos de Aurelle is a watch model that generates top revenue volume for Aurelle.

2025 Priority Cities
2025 Priority Cities are key urban locations in Greater China where Aurelle aims to focus its marketing efforts.

Shanghai
Shanghai is one of the 2025 Priority Cities for Aurelle's brand strategy in Greater China.<SEP>Shanghai is a city where a flagship Maison Salon is located, hosting private viewing events.

Beijing
Beijing is another of the 2025 Priority Cities for Aurelle's brand strategy in Greater China.<SEP>Beijing is a city with an SKP Private Salon operational for major collection launches.

Shenzhen
Shenzhen is one of the 2025 Priority Cities targeted by Aurelle in Greater China.

Chengdu
Chengdu is included in the 2025 Priority Cities for Aurelle's marketing focus in Greater China.

Hangzhou
Hangzhou is a 2025 Priority City for Aurelle's digital activation efforts in Greater China.

ION Orchard Maison Mansion
Singapore serves as the regional events hub for High Jewellery, specifically at ION Orchard Maison Mansion.

Sydney
Sydney is a city in Australia where a boutique serves a high proportion of affluent Chinese-Australian clientele.<SEP>Sydney is a city with a Pitt Street Maison for specific high jewellery launches.

Taipei 101
Taipei 101 serves as a high-visibility flagship boutique in Taiwan.

Brand Governance
The APAC Brand Expression Guidelines v3.2 govern local adaptations and campaign validations within the region.

Melbourne
Melbourne is a city in Australia where a boutique serves a high proportion of affluent Chinese-Australian clientele.

Greater China Market Intelligence Report
The Greater China Market Intelligence Report provides insights and forecasts for the market dynamics in Mainland China, Hong Kong, and Macau for FY2025.

Mainland China
Mainland China is a key market for Aurelle, driving volume and new client acquisition in the luxury sector.<SEP>Mainland China is a location that contributes to the consumer dynamics in Taiwan, particularly among visitors.<SEP>Mainland China is a market with retail prices indexed at 118–125, influenced by import duties and VAT.

Macau
Macau is a market for Aurelle that captures tourism-linked luxury spending from Mainland VIPs.<SEP>Macau is a market with retail prices indexed at 103–106, similar to Hong Kong's low duty structure.

520 Day
520 Day, occurring on May 20, is a couples gifting occasion that is commercially significant for Aurelle.

FY2025
FY2025 refers to the fiscal year for which the market outlook and revenue targets are projected in the report.

CNY Preparation
CNY Preparation is a key gifting season in January–February, contributing significantly to revenue.

618 Shopping Festival
The 618 Shopping Festival in June is a digital-led promotional event for luxury brands.

Golden Week
Golden Week in October marks a period of tourism recovery for luxury boutiques.

Tiffany (LVMH)
Tiffany, part of LVMH, has repositioned itself as a higher-tier luxury brand and competes directly with Aurelle.

Van Cleef
Van Cleef is a strong competitor in high jewellery and fine jewellery markets, particularly known for its Alhambra motif.

Bulgari
Bulgari is a luxury brand competing with Aurelle, known for aggressive boutique expansion and strong positioning in the new wealth tier.<SEP>Bulgari is a competitor of Aurelle, overlapping in both jewellery and watches markets.

Christmas and New Year Gifting
Christmas and New Year Gifting in December is a key period for luxury purchases, particularly watches and jewellery.

Singles' Day
Singles' Day on November 11 is a significant shopping day where luxury brands adjust their participation strategies.

Lao Feng Xiang
Lao Feng Xiang is a domestic brand competing for the aspirational tier but not directly with Aurelle's luxury positioning.

Chow Tai Fook
Chow Tai Fook is another domestic brand competing for aspirational luxury but not a direct competitor to Aurelle.

WeChat
WeChat is a critical digital platform for luxury in China, facilitating various consumer interactions and services.

Weibo
Weibo is a social media platform that has declining relevance for luxury brands but is maintained for KOL relationships.

RED (Xiaohongshu)
RED is the leading luxury aspiration platform in China, where Aurelle manages its content strategy.<SEP>RED is a brand content publishing platform managed by the CN marketing team, focusing on brand protection policies.

Douyin (TikTok China)
Douyin is a growing platform for brand awareness among younger demographics in China.

Mainland VIPs
Mainland VIPs are very high-net-worth individuals from Mainland China who visit Macau for entertainment and luxury spending.

KOL (Key Opinion Leader)
KOLs are influential figures in China that Aurelle collaborates with for marketing and brand awareness.

KOC (Key Opinion Consumer)
KOCs are authentic high-net-worth individuals who share genuine purchases and are valuable for conversion strategies.

HNW Gifting
HNW gifting refers to high-net-worth gifting practices, particularly in private channels, which continue strongly despite regulatory constraints.

Luxury Sector
The luxury sector encompasses high-end goods and services, which are projected to outperform in growth rates compared to general market trends.

Aurelle Macau
Aurelle Macau is an organization operating in the casino resort ecosystem, managing luxury boutiques in Macau.

Galaxy Macau
Galaxy Macau is another boutique operated by Aurelle Macau, contributing to the casino resort ecosystem.

Client Profile
The client profile for Aurelle Macau indicates a very high customer lifetime value (CLV) potential but a low retention rate.

Wynn Palace
Wynn Palace is a high-performance boutique operated by Aurelle Macau, known for its success in attracting clients.

Revenue Target FY2025
The revenue target for Aurelle Macau in FY2025 is set at USD 22 million.

Very High Net Worth Individuals (VHNWIs)
Very High Net Worth Individuals (VHNWIs) are clients visiting Macau for entertainment, characterized by significant discretionary spending.

CRM Capture Rate
CRM capture rate is a critical metric for Aurelle Macau, targeting to capture full details of 75% of transactions over USD 5,000.

High Complication Watches
High Complication Watches are luxury timepieces that also perform above the average in the Asia-Pacific region in Macau.

VIP Program Integration
VIP program integration refers to the relationships maintained by Aurelle Macau with major casino VIP hosts for client introductions.

Cultural Nuance
Cultural nuance highlights the social influences affecting luxury purchases in Macau, emphasizing the role of companion groups and staff recommendations.

Casino Resort Ecosystem
The casino resort ecosystem refers to the integrated environment in which luxury boutiques operate, attracting clients for entertainment and high spending.

Social Proof
Social proof is a psychological phenomenon where individuals are influenced by the actions and opinions of others, particularly in luxury purchasing decisions.

Santos Medium Steel
Santos Medium Steel is the highest volume SKU in the APAC market, priced at approximately USD 7,100.

La Panthère de Aurelle
La Panthère de Aurelle is an iconic watch collection that has been a significant motif for the brand since the 1910s.

Aurelle Watches Portfolio
The Aurelle Watches Portfolio serves as a sales and product knowledge reference for the brand's offerings in the APAC market.

Ballon Bleu de Aurelle
Ballon Bleu de Aurelle is a modern watch collection that appeals predominantly to female buyers, noted for its unique design and emotional connection.

Tank Must
Tank Must is a watch collection recognized for its rectangular design and historical significance, targeting female clients primarily.<SEP>Tank Must is a watch model from Aurelle known for its high volume units and entry luxury status.

Santos Large SSGP
Santos Large SSGP is a popular bicolor watch in the APAC market, priced at approximately USD 8,500.

Santos de Aurelle Skeleton
Santos de Aurelle Skeleton is a high visibility piece priced at approximately USD 19,500, serving as a boutique display anchor.

Tank Must Small Quartz
Tank Must Small Quartz is an entry luxury watch priced at approximately USD 3,200, known for its highest gifting volume.

Santos 100 Chronograph
Santos 100 Chronograph is a watch appealing to motorsport and aviation clients, priced at approximately USD 14,200.

Tank Must Large SolarBeat™
Tank Must Large SolarBeat™ is a sustainable watch priced at approximately USD 4,100, resonating well with markets in Australia, Singapore, and Japan.

Tank Louis
Tank Louis is a higher heritage tier watch priced at approximately USD 7,800, aimed at clients seeking the 'pure' Tank expression.

Tank Cintrée
Tank Cintrée is a limited edition watch with an elongated vintage form, priced at approximately USD 12,500, noted for its high desirability and waitlist in Japan and Taiwan.

Ballon Bleu 33mm Steel
Ballon Bleu 33mm Steel is an entry-level watch priced at approximately USD 6,800, recognized for its high female volume sales.

Ballon Bleu 36mm Bicolor Diamond Bezel
Ballon Bleu 36mm Bicolor Diamond Bezel is the highest revenue per unit in the collection, priced at approximately USD 11,500.

Ballon Bleu Tourbillon
Ballon Bleu Tourbillon is the top of the range watch priced at approximately USD 72,000, appealing to high jewelry clients.

Ballon Bleu 42mm Full Gold
Ballon Bleu 42mm Full Gold is a male buyer-targeted watch priced at approximately USD 28,000, serving as a wealth signal.

Ballon Bleu 33mm
Ballon Bleu 33mm is a watch model that offers a cross-sell opportunity to the Ballon Bleu 36mm upgrade within 24 months.<SEP>Ballon Bleu 33mm is a luxury watch that is a primary self-purchase item for women in Japan.

Ballon Bleu 36mm
Ballon Bleu 36mm is an upgraded watch model that can be cross-sold to customers who purchase the Ballon Bleu 33mm.

Trinity
Trinity is another jewelry piece that has a strong cross-sell relationship with the Ballon Bleu watches.<SEP>Trinity is an iconic code that signifies a recognizable design element within the product range.

Panthère de Aurelle
The Panthère de Aurelle is an iconic motif representing elegance, power, and sensuality, central to the brand's identity.

Panthère Small Steel
Panthère Small Steel is an entry-level jewelry-watch priced at approximately USD 5,500.

Rotonde de Aurelle
Rotonde de Aurelle represents the brand's pinnacle of horological mastery, showcasing grand complications.

Panthère Tourbillon
Panthère Tourbillon is a luxury watch priced at approximately USD 115,000, categorized within high jewelry.

data.entity_name: Panthère Medium Full Gold Diamond Bracelet
data.content:
Panthère Medium Full Gold Diamond Bracelet
Panthère Medium Full Gold Diamond Bracelet is a high-end jewelry piece priced at approximately USD 34,000, categorized within Tier 1 and Tier 2 cross-sell opportunities.

Rotonde Ultra-Thin Perpetual Calendar
Rotonde Ultra-Thin Perpetual Calendar is a luxury watch priced at approximately USD 98,000.

Rotonde Tourbillon
Rotonde Tourbillon is a luxury watch priced at approximately USD 165,000.

Rotonde Minute Repeater Flying Tourbillon
Rotonde Minute Repeater Flying Tourbillon is a high-value watch priced at approximately USD 410,000.

Ulysse
Ulysse is a new collection launching in Q2 2025, aimed at the sport-luxury segment.

Aurelle Santos
Aurelle Santos is identified as a thematic connector for corporate hospitality at APAC race events.

Boutique Director
The Boutique Director also makes personal phone calls to Tier 1 Icon invitees as part of the invitation protocol.<SEP>The Boutique Director may personally call high-risk customers as part of a win-back campaign.<SEP>The Boutique Director oversees the operations and client interactions at the high jewellery events.<SEP>The Boutique Director is responsible for sending personal thank-you notes to preview attendees and overseeing boutique operations.<SEP>The Boutique Director is accountable for the boutique's performance, managing staff and client experiences.

Japanese GP
The Japanese GP is another motorsport event included in the APAC Race Events.

CRM System
The CRM system is a method used for managing event invitations, ensuring all invitations go through this system.<SEP>The CRM System is utilized for managing client relationships, tracking purchases, and facilitating communication.

Australian GP
The Australian GP is also part of the APAC Race Events, contributing to the motorsport heritage in the region.

APAC Race Events
APAC Race Events refer to a series of motorsport events held in the Asia-Pacific region, including the Singapore GP, Japanese GP, and Australian GP.

Singapore GP
The Singapore GP is a specific motorsport event that is part of the APAC Race Events.

Market Director
The Market Director is responsible for making personal phone calls to Tier 1 Icon invitees before sending written invitations.<SEP>The Market Director is responsible for overseeing market strategies and is notified for personalized outreach when a customer is at high risk of churn.<SEP>The Market Director is responsible for overseeing client relationships and approving budgets within the Aurelle framework.

Event Invitation Protocol
The Event Invitation Protocol outlines the procedures for sending invitations to events, including tiered invitation methods and RSVP management.

Personal Stylist
The Personal Stylist is responsible for contacting Tier 1 VIP invitees and sending written invitations.<SEP>The Personal Stylist is responsible for client engagement and presentation during high jewellery events.

Tier 1 Icon
Tier 1 Icon refers to a category of invitees who receive personal phone calls from the Market Director or Boutique Director before written invitations.

Tier 2
Tier 2 refers to a category of invitees who receive written invitations via their preferred channel, with a follow-up message from a Stylist.

data.entity_name: APAC Event Strategy & Client Experience Programming FY2025
data.content:
APAC Event Strategy & Client Experience Programming FY2025
The APAC Event Strategy & Client Experience Programming FY2025 outlines Aurelle's strategic approach to client engagement through events.

Tier 1 VIP
Tier 1 VIP is a category of invitees who receive personal contact from a Personal Stylist and a written invitation within 24 hours.

World Athletics Championship
The World Athletics Championship is a global sports competition featuring top athletes in track and field.

High Jewellery Private Viewings
High Jewellery private viewings are exclusive events designed to showcase high-value jewellery pieces to select clients.

Maison Private Event
Maison private events are exclusive gatherings that significantly enhance client relationship capital for Aurelle.

Watch Celebration Events
Watch celebration events are private gatherings focused on watch-specific programming and client engagement.

Brand Experience & Heritage Events
Brand experience & heritage events provide immersive experiences that deepen emotional connections to Aurelle's history and values.

APAC Regional Maison Summit
The APAC Regional Maison Summit is an annual flagship event gathering top clients for a luxury cultural program.

Watches & Wonders Geneva
Watches & Wonders Geneva is an exclusive invitation-only event showcasing luxury watches and experiences.<SEP>Watches & Wonders Geneva is a global event where luxury watch brands showcase their latest collections.

Paris High Jewellery Gala
The Paris High Jewellery Gala is a prestigious event aligned with the main collection launch, featuring exclusive client experiences.<SEP>Paris High Jewellery Gala is an exclusive event featuring high-end jewellery brands and their collections.

Four Seasons
Four Seasons is a luxury hotel brand that partners with Aurelle for hosting intimate client events.

Raffles Hotels
Raffles Hotels is a luxury hotel brand that partners with Aurelle for hosting intimate client events.

Aman
Aman is a luxury hotel brand that collaborates with Aurelle for client event venues.

Art Basel HK
Art Basel HK is an art fair that collaborates with Aurelle for brand presence and private collector activation.

Frieze Seoul
Frieze Seoul is an art fair that partners with Aurelle for brand presence and private collector activation.

Le Cordon Bleu Tokyo
Le Cordon Bleu Tokyo is a culinary institution that partners with Aurelle for Maison Experience events.

Le Cordon Bleu Bangkok
Le Cordon Bleu Bangkok is a culinary institution that collaborates with Aurelle for Maison Experience events.

Singapore Tourism Board
The Singapore Tourism Board partners with Aurelle for hosting international client groups.

78% Repeat Purchase Rate
The 78% repeat purchase rate indicates the effectiveness of Maison private events in driving client loyalty.

USD 8.4M
USD 8.4M is the allocated budget for the FY2025 APAC event strategy, representing 1.35% of the revenue target.

Japan National Tourism Agency
The Japan National Tourism Agency collaborates with Aurelle for hosting international client groups.

Formula 1
Formula 1 is a motorsport organization that collaborates with Aurelle for corporate hospitality events.

54% Baseline
The 54% baseline represents the standard repeat purchase rate for clients who did not attend events.

2.3x Higher Transaction Value
The average transaction value in the 90 days post-event is 2.3 times higher than during non-event periods.

67% Lower Churn Rate
The 67% lower churn rate indicates that event attendees are less likely to stop purchasing compared to non-attendees.

41% RSVP Acceptance to Purchase Conversion
The 41% RSVP acceptance to purchase conversion rate reflects the effectiveness of High Jewellery private viewings.

28% RSVP Acceptance to Purchase Conversion
The 28% RSVP acceptance to purchase conversion rate indicates the effectiveness of watch events.

19% RSVP Acceptance to Purchase Conversion
The 19% RSVP acceptance to purchase conversion rate shows the effectiveness of brand experience events.

Event Attendees
Event attendees experience a 67% lower churn rate compared to non-attendees, indicating better client retention.

TIER 2 - PREMIUM
TIER 2 - PREMIUM is a client tier for established professionals and entrepreneurs with specific entitlements and a focus on loyalty.

TIER 0 - PROSPECT
TIER 0 - PROSPECT refers to potential clients who have not made a purchase but are actively tracked for engagement.

TIER 1 - MAISON VIP
TIER 1 - MAISON VIP is a client tier for ultra-high-net-worth individuals with specific entitlements and a strong emotional connection to the brand.

Aurelle APAC Client Segmentation Framework
The Aurelle APAC Client Segmentation Framework provides guidelines for managing client relationships and resource allocation.

TIER 1A - MAISON ICON
TIER 1A - MAISON ICON is a subset of TIER 1 clients with elevated entitlements and direct access to higher-level brand representatives.

TIER 3 - ASPIRATIONAL
TIER 3 - ASPIRATIONAL is a client tier for young professionals and aspirational luxury entrants with entry-level purchase patterns.

Watch Specialist
A Watch Specialist is a professional who assists TIER 1A clients with watch collection reviews and servicing.<SEP>The Watch Specialist is a technical role dedicated to the watch category, conducting events and supporting client education.

Gemologist
A Gemologist is a specialist who conducts home visits for collection reviews and servicing for TIER 1A clients.<SEP>The Gemologist presents the collection story and craftsmanship narrative during high jewellery events.<SEP>The Gemologist is a specialist in high jewelry, leading private viewings and educating clients about gemstones.

CLV
CLV (Customer Lifetime Value) is a metric used to evaluate the total revenue a business can expect from a single customer account over time.

SIHH
SIHH (Salon International de la Haute Horlogerie) is a prestigious event dedicated to luxury watchmaking.

Aurelle Private Foundation
Aurelle Private Foundation organizes events and brand heritage experiences for clients.

CRM Director
The CRM Director collaborates with the Market Director on escalated cases involving customers who have not made a purchase in over 270 days.

China
China has a churn rate of 14%, facing high competition from local and luxury brands, with digital engagement helping to mitigate churn.<SEP>China is a region with a separate digital ecosystem, requiring unique technology solutions due to its distinct internet environment.

Salesforce Luxury CRM
Salesforce Luxury CRM is a custom platform used for managing client interactions and is integrated with local platforms for various regions.

WeChat Work
WeChat Work is a platform integrated with Salesforce Luxury CRM for client interactions in China.<SEP>WeChat Work is the primary communication tool for stylists and clients in China, ensuring data compliance and CRM logging.

Line Business
Line Business is a platform integrated with Salesforce Luxury CRM for client interactions in Japan and Thailand.

KakaoTalk Business
KakaoTalk Business is a platform integrated with Salesforce Luxury CRM for client interactions in South Korea.

Churn Context
Churn Context refers to the analysis of customer retention rates and factors influencing churn across different markets.

High Risk
High Risk refers to customers who made their last purchase between 180 to 270 days ago, requiring personalized outreach within 7 days.

Critical Risk
Critical Risk refers to customers who made their last purchase over 270 days ago, leading to escalated actions including a win-back campaign.

Reactivation Pool
The Reactivation Pool consists of customers who have not responded to outreach for over 540 days and are approached with high-value content.

Xinyi District
Xinyi District is a location associated with luxury retail, noted for significant sales figures.

TSMC
TSMC is a semiconductor company that has generated significant wealth, contributing to a new tier of high-net-worth individuals in Taiwan.

Trinity Ring
The Trinity Ring is a luxury item that significantly outperforms the LOVE bracelet in the APAC market.<SEP>The Trinity Ring is a luxury item that significantly outperforms other products in Taiwan's market.

SOGO Zhongxiao
SOGO Zhongxiao is a retail organization that has reported sales of USD 3 million.<SEP>SOGO Zhongxiao is a boutique in Taiwan, contributing to the luxury market.

Rotonde Complications
Rotonde Complications are luxury watches that have a significant following among independent collectors in Taiwan.

Semiconductor Industry
The semiconductor industry is a sector that has generated wealth in Taiwan, influencing consumer preferences for luxury items.

High-Net-Worth Individuals (HNWI)
High-Net-Worth Individuals (HNWI) are affluent consumers in Taiwan with a strong interest in wearable luxury items.

Consumer Profile
Consumer Profile refers to the characteristics and preferences of consumers in the luxury market, highlighting trends and behaviors.

Market Intelligence
Market Intelligence refers to the analysis and understanding of market trends and consumer behavior in specific regions.

Document ID DOC-009
Document ID DOC-009 refers to a report on market intelligence in Northeast Asia, focusing on Japan, South Korea, and Taiwan.

Understated Luxury
Understated Luxury is a consumer preference trend where less obvious luxury items are favored over more ostentatious options.

Ginza Maison
Ginza Maison is a flagship boutique in Tokyo, Japan, generating significant revenue and featuring multiple private salons.

Omotesando Boutique
Omotesando Boutique is a luxury retail location in Tokyo, targeting a younger client demographic.

Fukuoka, Sapporo, Sendai
Fukuoka, Sapporo, and Sendai are regional boutiques in Japan, operating in a smaller format.

Osaka Shinsaibashi
Osaka Shinsaibashi is a boutique in Osaka, Japan, catering to a wealthy client base with traditional preferences.

Nagoya Mitsukoshi
Nagoya Mitsukoshi is a boutique in Nagoya, Japan, known for its clientele with strong watch preferences.

Yen
Yen is the currency of Japan, currently experiencing weakness against the USD, influencing luxury purchasing behavior.

K-drama
K-drama refers to Korean television dramas that have a significant cultural influence on luxury consumption in South Korea.

K-pop
K-pop refers to Korean pop music that contributes to the luxury aspiration culture in South Korea.

Hallyu
Hallyu, or the Korean Wave, describes the global popularity of South Korean culture, impacting luxury markets.

Cheongdam Maison
Cheongdam Maison is a flagship boutique in Seoul, South Korea, known for attracting ultra-high-net-worth clients.

Lotte World Tower
Lotte World Tower is a luxury retail location in South Korea, appealing to both tourists and younger domestic clients.

Hyundai Seoul
Hyundai Seoul is a department store format in South Korea, providing accessible luxury options.

Galleria Hannam
Galleria Hannam is a growing luxury district in South Korea, attracting younger high-net-worth individuals.

Busan
Busan is a resort luxury destination in South Korea, driven by tourist demand.

Taipei 101 Maison
Taipei 101 Maison is a flagship boutique in Taiwan, generating significant revenue.

Breeze Center
Breeze Center is a luxury retail location in the Xinyi District of Taiwan.

Jibun-Uke
Jibun-Uke is a Japanese concept referring to the practice of treating oneself, particularly in the context of luxury purchases.

Trinity Necklace
The Trinity Necklace is a luxury jewelry item that is a primary self-purchase item for women in Japan.

Ochugen
Ochugen is a traditional Japanese gift-giving season in July that generates significant revenue in fragrances and accessories.

Oseibo
Oseibo is a traditional Japanese gift-giving season in December that contributes to luxury sales.

March Graduation Season
March graduation season is a significant time for luxury purchases, particularly watches and fine jewelry in Japan.

June Wedding Season
June wedding season drives peaks in luxury purchases, especially in watches and fine jewelry in Japan.

APAC Region
The APAC region represents Aurelle's largest growth area, contributing a substantial portion of the company's global revenue.

Watches Category
The watches category is a significant revenue stream for Aurelle, representing 38% of APAC revenue and targeting new clients under 35.

Chengdu Taikoo Li
Chengdu Taikoo Li is a flagship boutique location for Aurelle, set to open in Q1 2025.

Shenzhen MixC
Shenzhen MixC is a standard boutique location for Aurelle, scheduled to open in Q2 2025.

Nanjing Deji
Nanjing Deji is a standard boutique location for Aurelle, planned for opening in Q3 2025.

Van Cleef & Arpels
Van Cleef & Arpels is a primary competitor of Aurelle in the jewellery market within the APAC region.

Maison Mansions
Maison Mansions is a venue for Private Client Salon viewings, which are a high-margin channel for Aurelle.

Rolex
Rolex is a competitor of Aurelle in the watches market, known for its non-overlapping positioning.

Patek Philippe
Patek Philippe is a competitor of Aurelle in the watches market, competing for the same client wallet.

Tiffany & Co
Tiffany & Co is a direct competitor of Aurelle, especially after its repositioning post-LVMH acquisition.

USD 620M
USD 620M is the target net revenue for Aurelle in the APAC region for FY2025.

USD 543M
USD 543M represents the actual revenue for Aurelle in the APAC region for FY2024.

38% of Global Aurelle Revenue
38% of global Aurelle revenue is contributed by Europe, which is the largest market compared to APAC.

14% YoY Growth
14% YoY growth refers to the year-over-year revenue increase targeted by Aurelle for FY2025 compared to FY2024.

34% of Global Aurelle Revenue
34% of global Aurelle revenue is contributed by the APAC region, making it a significant market.

VIC Salon Spaces
VIC salon spaces are enhanced areas within boutiques aimed at improving customer experience and luxury service.

2 Percentage Points
The gap between APAC and Europe revenue contributions is narrowing by approximately 2 percentage points annually.

Fragrance
Fragrance refers to scented products that are included in the offering alongside watches, jewellery, and accessories.

Jewellery
Jewellery refers to decorative items worn for personal adornment, included in a diverse product offering.

Accessories
Accessories are supplementary items that enhance personal style and are part of a larger product range.

LOVE
LOVE is an iconic code that represents a recognizable theme or design in the product offering.

Panthère
Panthère is an iconic code associated with a recognizable design in the product offering.

Maison Reality
Maison Reality refers to the immersive experience clients have when entering an Aurelle boutique, emphasizing welcome and understanding.

Client Experience Protocol
Client Experience Protocol details the standards and practices for engaging with clients in Aurelle boutiques.

Aurelle Boutique Operations Standards
Aurelle Boutique Operations Standards outlines the operational protocols and client experience philosophy for Aurelle boutiques in the APAC region.

CRM Tablets
CRM tablets are client communication devices used by staff to manage client interactions and profiles.

La Panthère
La Panthère is a signature fragrance used in Aurelle boutiques to create a specific ambiance.

NPS Surveys
NPS Surveys are client feedback tools sent post-purchase to measure satisfaction and improve service quality.

Mystery Shopping
Mystery Shopping involves unannounced visits to evaluate boutique performance against established standards.<SEP>Mystery shopping involves unannounced visits to boutiques to evaluate service quality, conducted by a regional operations team or approved third-party firm.

Operations
Operations refers to the category under which the Aurelle Boutique Operations Standards and Client Experience Protocol is classified.

VIC Appointments
VIC Appointments are client appointments that may be suspended by the boutique director in case of HVAC failure exceeding four hours.

Performance Improvement Plan
A Performance Improvement Plan is triggered for boutiques scoring below 75 on mystery shopping, requiring action within a 60-day timeline.<SEP>Performance Improvement Plan is a corrective action triggered when a boutique scores below the minimum acceptable mystery shop score.

Mystery Shopping Scoring Dimensions
Mystery shopping scoring dimensions include greeting, product knowledge, experience quality, and closing and follow-up, each with specific weightings.

NPS Target
The NPS target for the APAC region is an average of 72, with individual boutiques needing a score above 60 for compliance.

Complaint & Escalation Protocol
The Complaint & Escalation Protocol outlines the levels of complaint resolution from stylist to APAC VP, detailing response times and documentation requirements.

Level 2
Level 2 complaints are resolved by the Boutique Director and involve product quality concerns and service dissatisfaction, requiring resolution within 24 hours.

Level 1
Level 1 complaints can be resolved by stylists and include product questions and minor service requests within the same interaction.

Level 3
Level 3 complaints involve the Market Director and include serious issues like defective high jewellery, requiring a response within 4 hours.

Level 4
Level 4 complaints escalate to the APAC VP for potential legal issues or significant brand reputation risks, requiring immediate notification.

Boutique
A boutique is a retail store where mystery shopping visits are conducted to evaluate service quality.

VIC Relationship
VIC relationship pertains to the relationship with Very Important Clients, which is a focus in the complaint escalation process.

Fragrance & Accessories Portfolio
The Fragrance & Accessories Portfolio includes various products aimed at client acquisition and gifting opportunities.

La Panthère EDP
La Panthère EDP is a flagship feminine fragrance with a green floral-chypre profile, known for its iconic bottle design.

Sunglasses & Fine Accessories
Sunglasses & Fine Accessories consist of selected eyewear and scarves, marketed as premium seasonal items.

LES HEURES DE AURELLE
LES HEURES DE AURELLE is a niche line of 18 unique fragrances, each representing an hour of the Parisian day, positioned as ultra-premium.

Watch Straps & Bracelets
Watch Straps & Bracelets include interchangeable straps for various watch models, available in multiple materials.

Écrou de Aurelle Collection
The Écrou de Aurelle Collection features small leather goods designed with a screw motif, serving as strong acquisition pieces.

DÉCLARATION
DÉCLARATION is Aurelle's primary masculine fragrance, characterized by a woody spicy oriental scent profile.

Client Acquisition
Client Acquisition is a strategic focus for Aurelle, emphasizing the importance of fragrance and accessories as entry points for new customers.

Gifting Completeness
Gifting Completeness refers to the ability for clients to give Aurelle products as gifts for various occasions and budgets.

Gifting Calendar
The Gifting Calendar outlines specific gifting opportunities tied to cultural events and holidays for fragrance and accessory products.

SAV Revenue & Commercial Policy
SAV Revenue & Commercial Policy outlines the revenue contributions and pricing strategies for SAV services in boutiques across the APAC region.<SEP>SAV Revenue & Commercial Policy describes the financial impact and contribution of after-sales service to overall boutique revenue.

Regional COO
The Regional COO is responsible for approving modifications to service tariffs in the APAC region.<SEP>The Regional COO is responsible for operational oversight in the region and reviews operations when market performance triggers concerns.

NPS (Net Promoter Score)
NPS (Net Promoter Score) is a metric used to track customer satisfaction and loyalty for SAV interactions, separate from purchase NPS.

Regional Gemologist
The Regional Gemologist is required to sign off on out-of-warranty High Jewellery restorations exceeding USD 5,000 before client quotations are issued.

Client Experience Team
The Client Experience Team conducts mystery client SAV assessments twice per year in each market to evaluate service quality.

APAC SAV Tariff Grid v2025
The APAC SAV Tariff Grid v2025 is an annual pricing document issued by Supply Chain Operations that outlines service tariffs for SAV.

Manufacture's Quality Team
Manufacture's Quality Team conducts bi-annual technical audits for each CSC to ensure compliance with quality standards.

CSC
CSC refers to Customer Service Centers that undergo bi-annual technical audits by the Manufacture's Quality Team to ensure compliance with quality standards.

Certified Service Centres
Certified Service Centres are facilities operated by Aurelle APAC for servicing watches and jewellery across various locations in the APAC region.

Singapore CSC
Singapore CSC is a Certified Service Centre that covers Singapore and Southeast Asian markets.

Shanghai CSC
Shanghai CSC is a Certified Service Centre in North Asia that offers full-service capabilities for watch and jewellery servicing.

Seoul CSC
Seoul CSC is a Certified Service Centre located in Cheongdam, specializing in watches and jewellery with specific restoration capabilities.

Tokyo CSC
Tokyo CSC is a Certified Service Centre located in Ginza, specializing in watches and fine jewellery with the highest technical capacity in APAC.

Hong Kong CSC
Hong Kong CSC is a Certified Service Centre located in Elements Mall, covering Hong Kong, Macau, and overflow from South China.

Sydney CSC
Sydney CSC is a Certified Service Centre that serves the Australian market exclusively.

VIC Engagement
VIC Engagement refers to the approach of treating all after-sales service interactions as opportunities for client engagement.

Delhi CSC
Delhi CSC is a Certified Service Centre that covers India, focusing on jewellery servicing and basic watch maintenance.

SAV Protocol
SAV Protocol outlines the procedures and standards for after-sales service and repair operations for clients, particularly VIP clients.

APAC SAV Network Structure
APAC SAV Network Structure refers to the organizational framework of Certified Service Centres across the APAC region for after-sales service.

Spare Parts & Calibre Inventory
Spare Parts & Calibre Inventory refers to the management and stocking of spare parts and movements for servicing current and legacy products.

Warranty Policy
Warranty Policy details the terms and conditions of warranties provided for watches and jewellery sold by Aurelle APAC.

Remote Market SAV Routing
Remote Market SAV Routing outlines the protocol for servicing clients in markets without a local Certified Service Centre.

Service Level Standards
Service Level Standards define the turnaround times and priorities for various types of after-sales services.

High Jewellery Restorations
The Regional Gemologist must approve out-of-warranty High Jewellery restorations above USD 5,000 before issuing client quotations.

SAV Assessments
The Client Experience Team conducts mystery client SAV assessments twice per year to evaluate service quality.

SAV Interactions
NPS is tracked separately for SAV interactions to measure customer satisfaction and loyalty.

Paris Maison Immersion
Paris Maison Immersion is a 5-day program involving visits to ateliers and presentations on gemstone sourcing.

CRM Data
CRM data is utilized to design bespoke touchpoints and manage multi-year VIC relationships.

Elite Hosting & Events Protocol
Elite Hosting & Events Protocol covers management of private salon events and catering standards.

VIC Relationships
VIC relationships refer to the management of milestone moments and life event marketing for clients.

Module 4 - Commercial Excellence
Module 4 emphasizes commercial strategies such as conversion rate optimization and average transaction value uplift.

Module 3 - Watches Technical Excellence
Module 3 focuses on technical knowledge of watches, including movements and complications.

Bespoke & Personalisation Masterclass
The Bespoke & Personalisation Masterclass teaches bespoke jewellery design and client co-creation.

Track 3 - VIC Mastery
Track 3 is a training program for personal stylists and senior sales associates, focusing on VIC mastery.

Digital Intimacy
Digital Intimacy involves using messaging platforms for hyper-personalized VIC engagement.

Track 4 - Leadership & Boutique Commerce
Track 4 is a program for boutique managers and directors focusing on leadership and commerce.

Assessment & Certification Standards
Assessment & Certification Standards define the criteria for module completion and certification validity.

Strategic Client Portfolio Management
Strategic Client Portfolio Management involves managing VIC strategies and event planning.

P&L Management for Retail Leaders
P&L Management for Retail Leaders teaches financial management and team performance connection.

People Leadership in Luxury
People Leadership in Luxury focuses on coaching and developing sales associate talent.

Change Leadership
Change Leadership addresses implementing new systems and boutique renovations.

Learning Delivery Methods
Learning Delivery Methods outline various training formats and their respective hour allocations.

data.entity_name: Performance Link - CAEP to Commercial KPIs
data.content:
Performance Link - CAEP to Commercial KPIs
Performance Link describes the relationship between CAEP effectiveness and commercial outcomes.

Annual Talent & Commerce Review
The Annual Talent & Commerce Review is a meeting held each February to evaluate performance metrics.

Average Transaction Value
Average Transaction Value (ATV) refers to the average amount spent per transaction, which is a key metric in retail performance.

Archive Collections Viewing
Archive Collections Viewing is an activity during the Paris Maison Immersion where participants view historical collections.

Client Advisor Excellence Program
The Client Advisor Excellence Program (CAEP) is a comprehensive learning and development program designed for client-facing roles within Aurelle APAC.

Gemstone Sourcing Presentation
Gemstone Sourcing Presentation is a component of the Paris Maison Immersion focused on sourcing gemstones.

Atelier Visits
Atelier Visits are part of the Paris Maison Immersion, involving tours of jewellery and watchmaking workshops.

APAC People Development Team
The APAC People Development Team administers the Client Advisor Excellence Program in partnership with the global Maison Academy.

Retail Training Managers
Retail Training Managers coordinate the market-level delivery of the Client Advisor Excellence Program in each key market.

Expert & Coaching Track
The Expert & Coaching Track is part of the Client Advisor Excellence Program aimed at senior sales associates and team leaders.

Leadership & Commerce
The Leadership & Commerce track is part of the Client Advisor Excellence Program for boutique managers.

Maison Academy
The Maison Academy, located in Paris, collaborates with the APAC People Development Team to deliver the Client Advisor Excellence Program.

Foundation Track
The Foundation Track is part of the Client Advisor Excellence Program designed for new sales associates with less than one year of experience.

Advanced Client Track
The Advanced Client Track is part of the Client Advisor Excellence Program for experienced sales associates with one to three years of experience.

Strategic Leadership
The Strategic Leadership track is part of the Client Advisor Excellence Program for boutique directors.

SAV Excellence Track
The SAV Excellence Track is part of the Client Advisor Excellence Program for after-sales advisors.

VIC Mastery Track
The VIC Mastery Track is part of the Client Advisor Excellence Program for VIC/personal stylists.

Finance Business Partners
Finance Business Partners are professionals who collaborate with Market Directors to develop and challenge budget plans.

Market Directors
Market Directors are individuals responsible for overseeing market operations and budget submissions within Aurelle APAC.<SEP>Market Directors are responsible for local market pricing adjustments but do not have the authority to change retail prices.

Regional VP Finance
Regional VP Finance is a senior executive responsible for financial oversight and budget consolidation for Aurelle APAC.

Aurelle Planning Portal
The Aurelle Planning Portal is a digital platform (SAP BPC) used for submitting detailed revenue and cost budgets by market.

McKinsey China Luxury Report
The McKinsey China Luxury Report is a publication that offers analysis and insights into the luxury market in China.

Paris HQ
Paris HQ is the headquarters of Aurelle APAC, where strategic decisions and budget approvals are made.

Bain & Company Luxury Study
The Bain & Company Luxury Study is a report that provides insights into luxury market forecasts used for validating growth assumptions.

Flash Sales
Flash Sales are daily reports generated from POS systems that provide insights into sales performance.

Revenue Breakdown by Category
Revenue Breakdown by Category refers to the categorization of revenue targets for the 2025 budget across various product categories.

2025 Budget
The 2025 Budget outlines revenue targets and financial planning for various categories and markets within Aurelle APAC.

Aurelle Global
Aurelle Global is a company that oversees financial operations and compliance across its APAC markets.

2025 Budget Total
The 2025 Budget Total represents the overall revenue target of 620M USD for Aurelle APAC.

Revenue Breakdown by Market
Revenue Breakdown by Market details the revenue targets and growth expectations for various markets in the 2025 budget.

Revenue Breakdown by Channel
Revenue Breakdown by Channel outlines the distribution of revenue targets across different sales channels for the 2025 budget.

Finance VP
The Finance VP manages financial strategies and reporting within the organization.

APAC President
The APAC President is responsible for overseeing operations and financial performance in the Asia-Pacific region.<SEP>The APAC President is responsible for recognizing long-service milestones with personal gifts and letters to employees.

Paris CFO
The Paris CFO oversees financial operations and compliance for the Paris market.

Capex Approval Thresholds
Capex Approval Thresholds define the financial limits and authorities required for capital expenditures.

Monthly P&L Structure
The Monthly P&L Structure outlines the financial reporting requirements for monthly profit and loss statements.

Currency & FX Risk Management
Currency & FX Risk Management describes the procedures for managing currency and foreign exchange risks in financial reporting.

data.entity_name: Boutique Renovation & New Opening Capex Norms
data.content:
Boutique Renovation & New Opening Capex Norms
Boutique Renovation & New Opening Capex Norms provide guidelines for capital expenditures related to boutique renovations and openings.

Staff Sales & Compliance
Staff Sales & Compliance outlines the policies regarding staff discounts and the compliance requirements for staff sales.

Audit & Financial Compliance
Audit & Financial Compliance details the requirements for internal audits and financial compliance within the organization.

Oracle Retail
Oracle Retail is a system used for generating daily flash reports automatically from point-of-sale data.

Aurelle Global Internal Audit
Aurelle Global Internal Audit team conducts annual internal audits for APAC markets.

Daily Flash Reports
Daily Flash Reports are generated from POS systems and include key financial metrics for boutiques.

Operations Review
Operations Review is triggered when markets miss more than three daily flashes per month, involving the Regional COO.

European HQ
European HQ is the central office located in Paris and Geneva that sets the retail prices for Aurelle.

APAC VP Finance
The APAC VP Finance is responsible for approving pricing exceptions and overseeing financial policies in the APAC region.

Switzerland
Switzerland is a market indexed to the EUR base for pricing, set at 100.

United Kingdom
The United Kingdom is a market with retail prices indexed at 105–108 due to post-Brexit duty adjustments.

Currency Risk Management
Currency Risk Management involves hedging a portion of forecasted foreign currency revenue to mitigate risks.

Revenue Recognition Policy
The Revenue Recognition Policy outlines when revenue is recognized for various types of transactions.

Private Client Salon
Private Client Salon refers to events that yield a higher gross margin of 75–79%.

Tax Refunds
Tax Refunds refer to the policies in place for VAT/GST refunds available to foreign tourists in various markets.

Pricing Architecture & Financial Policy APAC
Pricing Architecture & Financial Policy APAC is a document detailing the pricing governance and financial policies for Aurelle in the APAC region.

Pricing Governance
Pricing Governance refers to the framework under which retail prices are set and managed by Aurelle.

Market Pricing
Market Pricing refers to the localized pricing strategies based on the EUR base and various market conditions.

Service Adjustment
Service Adjustment is a 3% adjustment that Market Directors can apply on High Jewellery as per specific documentation.

T+3
T+3 indicates the specific day when a personal thank-you note from the Boutique Director is sent to all preview attendees.

Tier 2 Extended Preview List
The Tier 2 extended preview list includes attendees who may be offered uncommitted pieces from private viewings.

T+14
T+14 is the day when any uncommitted pieces from private viewings may be offered to the Tier 2 extended preview list.

T+1 TO T+30
T+1 TO T+30 refers to the timeline for post-launch activities and follow-ups after a boutique preview event.

Regional Performance Debrief
The Regional performance debrief is an event that evaluates sell-through rates, engagement, and client feedback after a boutique preview.

T+7
T+7 represents the day when a stylist follow-up call or message is made to all attendees to assess interest and answer questions.

Boutique Credit
Boutique credit is a form of credit given after a deposit is converted, allowing for future purchases within the boutique.

T+30
T+30 is the day designated for the regional performance debrief, evaluating various performance metrics.

High Jewellery Launch Protocol - APAC
The High Jewellery Launch Protocol - APAC outlines the strategic approach for launching high jewellery collections and engaging clients in the APAC region.

High Jewellery Collections
High Jewellery Collections represent the pinnacle of luxury and craftsmanship, with specific launches and client engagement strategies detailed in the protocol.

Geneva Watches & Wonders
Geneva Watches & Wonders is a side event where the 'Lumière Éternelle' High Jewellery capsule is presented.

Paris Gala
The Paris Gala is a significant annual event associated with the full annual High Jewellery Collection launch.

Faune Sauvage
Faune Sauvage is an animal motif capsule collection targeted at specific markets within the APAC region.

CNY Gifting
CNY Gifting refers to the bespoke orders for the Chinese New Year gifting season.

APAC Market Directors
The APAC Market Directors manage the market-specific strategies and client engagement for high jewellery collections.

Client Engagement Protocol
The Client Engagement Protocol outlines the strategies and practices for engaging clients during high jewellery launches.

Private Viewing Events
Private Viewing Events are exclusive gatherings held in flagship Maison salons to showcase high jewellery collections to select clients.

Maison Mansion
Maison Mansion refers to the designated flagship salons where high jewellery events are held.

Lumière Éternelle
The 'Lumière Éternelle' collection is presented at the Geneva Watches & Wonders event.

Full Annual High Jewellery Collection
The Full Annual High Jewellery Collection is launched at the Paris Gala.

WeChat Mini-Program
WeChat Mini-Program is a client-facing application for discovery, appointment booking, and loyalty program interaction in China.

Salesforce CRM
Salesforce CRM is the core platform used by Aurelle APAC, specifically the Luxury Edition customized as 'Maison Connect'.

Salesforce CN Instance
Salesforce CN Instance is a separate data instance hosted on Alibaba Cloud for the Chinese market, compliant with local data protection laws.

LINE Official Account
LINE Official Account is the main CRM communication channel in Japan, with a significant follower base.

KakaoTalk Business Channel
KakaoTalk Business Channel is the primary communication method for Aurelle in South Korea, facilitating client inquiries.

WhatsApp Business
WhatsApp Business is used in India, Philippines, and Thailand for client communication, integrated with Aurelle's CRM.

Aurelle Client App
Aurelle Client App is a new application launching in FY2025 for managing client relationships and services.

AI-Powered Personalization Tools
AI-Powered Personalization Tools are being piloted by the APAC CRM team to enhance client interactions through personalized recommendations.

Client 360 Profile
Client 360 Profile is a key module in Salesforce CRM that contains comprehensive client information including transactional history and preferences.

Touchpoint Scheduler
Touchpoint Scheduler is a module in Salesforce CRM that automates prompts for stylists regarding client-related events and product arrivals.

Tencent Analytics
Tencent Analytics is a tool used for analyzing WeChat user behavior in China.

Event Manager
Event Manager is a module in Salesforce CRM that handles invitation management and RSVP tracking for events.

Allocation Link
Allocation Link is a module in Salesforce CRM that connects stylists to the supply chain allocation engine for real-time stock status.

NPS Integration
NPS Integration is a module in Salesforce CRM that manages survey dispatch and response capture linked to client transaction records.

Great Firewall
The Great Firewall is a term used to describe China's internet censorship and regulation, impacting the digital ecosystem.

Alibaba Analytics
Alibaba Analytics is a tool used for analyzing e-commerce signals in China.

APAC CRM Team
The APAC CRM Team is responsible for piloting AI-powered personalization tools in the Asia-Pacific region.

Recommendation Engine
The Recommendation Engine analyzes purchase history and browsing behavior to suggest relevant pieces for stylists during outreach.

Gen AI Drafting Tool
The Gen AI Drafting Tool assists stylists in drafting personalized outreach messages, reducing drafting time significantly.

Churn Prediction Model
The Churn Prediction Model is a machine learning model that predicts churn probability based on APAC transactional data.

Mandarin Simplified
Mandarin Simplified is a preferred language for clients from China (CN).

Mandarin Traditional
Mandarin Traditional is a preferred language for clients from Taiwan (TW) and Hong Kong (HK).

Japanese
Japanese is one of the preferred languages for clients in the Asia-Pacific region.

Sentiment Analysis
Sentiment Analysis is applied to CRM stylist notes to identify patterns in client satisfaction and flag potential issues.

Korean
Korean is a preferred language for clients in the Asia-Pacific region.

English
English is one of the preferred languages for clients in the Asia-Pacific region.

Thai
Thai is a preferred language for clients in the Asia-Pacific region.

CRM Team Support
The CRM Team Support assists stylists with language gaps by providing communication support in clients' preferred languages.

Noah Carter
Noah Carter is a fictional character representing a sprinter who broke a record, illustrating the competitive nature of the workforce.

Human Capital & Talent Strategy
Human Capital & Talent Strategy is a framework used by Aurelle to manage and develop its workforce effectively.

Senior Stylist / VIC Relationship Manager
The Senior Stylist / VIC Relationship Manager oversees Tier 1 clients and focuses on client relationship management.

Personal Stylist / Client Advisor
The Personal Stylist / Client Advisor is an entry-level role responsible for managing client relationships and supporting senior stylists.

Aurelle Academy APAC
Aurelle Academy APAC is the training framework for new joiners at Aurelle, providing essential knowledge and skills.

Foundation Program
The Foundation Program is a mandatory training course for new joiners at Aurelle, covering the company's heritage and product knowledge.

Specialist Certifications
Specialist Certifications are mandatory training modules that enhance the skills of Aurelle employees within their roles.

Aurelle Maison
Aurelle Maison is the heritage and founding story of Aurelle, emphasizing the company's values and iconic pieces.

Advanced Programs
Advanced Programs are specialized training initiatives for senior roles at Aurelle, focusing on global immersion and leadership.

Aurelle Talent Accelerator
The Aurelle Talent Accelerator is a development and succession planning program for stylists achieving top metrics over two consecutive years.<SEP>The Aurelle Talent Accelerator is a career development program for top-performing stylists aimed at succession planning.

Luxury Leadership Program
The Luxury Leadership Program is an executive education module partnered with INSEAD for Boutique Directors and above.

Cultural Fluency
Cultural fluency refers to the understanding and appreciation of diverse cultures, which is considered operationally valuable for organizations.

Annual Maison Day
Annual Maison Day is an event where APAC staff receive a significant piece from the collection to reinforce their personal connection to the product.

Client-Facing Turnover
Client-facing turnover refers to the rate at which employees in client-facing roles leave an organization, with specific rates noted for Australia and the Philippines.

Operational Value
Cultural fluency is recognized as operationally valuable due to its diversity benefits in organizations.

Stylists
Stylists who meet performance metrics can enter the Aurelle Talent Accelerator for career advancement.

Long-Service Recognition
The APAC President marks long-service milestones with personal gifts and letters to employees.
